paper_title: The Hallucinations Leaderboard -- An Open Effort to Measure Hallucinations in Large Language Models
evaluation_method: Meta-benchmark using EleutherAI lm-evaluation-harness. Factuality score = avg of NQ(EM), TriviaQA(EM), PopQA(EM), TruthfulQA(MC2 acc), FEVER(acc), True-False(acc). Faithfulness score = avg of XSum(ROUGE-L), CNN/DailyMail(ROUGE-L), RACE(acc), SQuAD2.0(EM), NQ-Swap(EM), MemoTrap(acc), IFEval(acc), FaithDial(acc), HaluEval(acc). Mixed evaluation methods across sub-tasks.
